'''Radlin''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] stationed in the hidden [[Zelos II garrison|garrison]] on [[Zelos II]].<ref name="Gathering Shadows" />

Assigned to guarding the entrance to the base in the [[Valley of Umbra]], with two [[Scout trooper/Legends|scouts]] and an [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blaster]], he was a stickler for procedure but he was caught off guard by [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] posing as a [[Jumper|Walking Dead]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] that bored Imperials had been using for target practice.<ref name="Gathering Shadows" />

The mistake cost him his life, his uniform and his clearance enabling Okeefe and [[Tru'eb Cholakk|Cholakk]] to infiltrate the Valley.<ref name="Gathering Shadows" />

==Appearances==
*{{StoryCite|story=Gathering Shadows|book=Tales from the New Republic}} {{1st}}
